title: No Aggressive Mobs
description: Removes almost all aggressive mobs and adds new crafts.
body:
We all love playing minecraft, but not everyone likes facing hostile mobs, so we usually disable them. The problem is that it's impossible to get so many important items without monsters! Moreover, the peaceful regime simplifies everything too much.

This mod will fix it all!

When I created this mod, I decided to fix a bunch of things that usually drive you crazy in Minecraft: animal drops have become more realistic, carrots and potatoes and beets can now be found in tall grass, and several "missing" recipes have been added.

# Functions
- This mod provides alternative sources of loot from all hostile mobs. Some of them can be created or smelted, while others can be obtained from mining non-hostile mobs.
- Modifies prey from animals, making them more realistic.
- Removes the spawn of hostile mobs at any difficulty level.

# New crafts
